name: Apache Celix Dev Container
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p build && conan install . --build missing --profile debug --options celix/*:build_all=True --options celix/*:enable_address_sanitizer=True --options celix/*:enable_testing=True --options celix/*:enable_ccache=True --conf:build tools.cmake.cmaketoolchain:generator=Ninja --output-folder build && conan build . --profile debug --options celix/*:build_all=True --options celix/*:enable_address_sanitizer=True --options celix/*:enable_testing=True --options celix/*:enable_ccache=True --conf:build tools.cmake.cmaketoolchain:generator=Ninja --output-folder build
